strict_clean_rule: Reject spans with lower-thirds, burned captions, channel bugs, watermarks, title cards, logos used as overlays, split screens, end cards, or explanatory graphics.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.source_title: Boeing 737 MAX first flight media portal
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: May include intro/end branding or embedded PR title cards; exact span audit required.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Best candidate for a new opening hook or final tail if clean windows exist.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.source_title: Boeing completes first flight of the 737 MAX
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: Possible title card/logo at head/tail; use only raw flight windows.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Backup to the Boeing media portal if portal asset is awkward to retrieve.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.source_title: FAA Administrator Steve Dickson piloting the Boeing 737 MAX (B-ROLL)
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: yt-dlp returned unavailable locally; access still needs manual/browser or alternate retrieval check.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Flight deck/body variety, not engine repetition.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.source_title: Passenger planes taxiing on the airport runway
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: Airline markings may appear; exact frame audit required for strict-clean branding policy.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Exterior airport/taxi bridge, useful before/after narration body rather than hook.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.source_title: United 737 MAX at Newark gate in thunderstorm
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: Airline branding likely visible; may be too atmospheric/generic if aircraft is small.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Tail or transition texture if exact clean span works.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: Generic airport; aircraft logos may be visible; not guaranteed MAX.
clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.intended_use: Clean exterior motion filler only if exact MAX specificity is not required for that slot.
Weather/pressure texture or bridge, not hero source.

clean_likely_sources_to_audit_first.clean_risk: Still an engine close-up; should not lead the proof.

conditional_youtube_candidates.source_title: B737 MAX Turbulent Departure out of Toronto (FULL ATC)
conditional_youtube_candidates.reason_to_keep: Real 737 MAX cockpit/departure POV with strong motion variety.
conditional_youtube_candidates.clean_risk: Creator video; cockpit displays/overlays/channel marks need dense audit.

conditional_youtube_candidates.source_title: Boeing 737 MAX 9 Clear Day Landing Washington Dulles | Complete Approach Sequence
conditional_youtube_candidates.reason_to_keep: Short, direct landing sequence on a MAX 9.
conditional_youtube_candidates.clean_risk: Creator source; likely cleaner than trip reports but still needs overlay check.

conditional_youtube_candidates.source_title: Boeing 737 Max Cold and Dark startup (ASMR)
conditional_youtube_candidates.reason_to_keep: Cockpit startup texture without relying on engine exterior.
conditional_youtube_candidates.clean_risk: Must verify real aircraft, no overlays, and not simulator/training abstraction.

conditional_youtube_candidates.source_title: A Boeing Chief Pilot's Perspective of the 737 MAX Flying Display
conditional_youtube_candidates.reason_to_keep: Official Boeing flight-display perspective; more dynamic than static engine shots.
conditional_youtube_candidates.clean_risk: Likely interview/editorial framing; only raw aircraft windows are eligible.

conditional_youtube_candidates.reason_to_keep: Long upload of Boeing flight demonstration material.
conditional_youtube_candidates.clean_risk: Repost/source-chain risk and possible channel branding.

reject_for_this_request: Trip reports with title cards or route labels unless an exact clean window is proven.
News packages and explainer videos because they are graphics/text-led.
More LEAP-engine-only close-ups as hook or tail material.
recommended_audit_order: Try the Boeing media portal video from the press release and pull a frame strip before any import.
If that is not clean enough, audit Boeing official YouTube first-flight and FAA B-roll.
Use Pexels/Pixabay stock only for bridge/tail variety, not as the main causal hook unless the aircraft is clearly readable.
Keep one cockpit/departure creator video in reserve, preferably Pilot View or First We Fly, but only after exact-span strict-clean proof.

handoff.recommended_next_action: Audit Boeing first-flight media portal and FAA B-roll with frame strips, then choose one official hook source plus one clean exterior/tail source.
